short_definition: A first-class instance record for a Cloudflare projection with identity, policy, health, and teardown.
description: CloudflareProjectionInstance ties together the projection id, source authority runtime, target Cloudflare execution surface, endpoint state, access policy, and teardown/revocation semantics. It is the operator-facing object that explains what is running and how it can be stopped.
boundaries: Not the local NARS session itself.

authority.notes: The projection doc already names the projection instance as the central object and documents its fields.

counterexamples: a health URL with no identity or policy record

confidence.basis: The projection doc already defines a concrete instance object with lifecycle, policy, and teardown fields.
